zh.Ashton under Lyne, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林
zh.lifeSummary: 當LADY MARGARET DE BARTON於1421年出生在英國藍卡爾米德萊頓時，她的父親JOHN DE BARTON II26歲，母親MAUDE MIDDLETON25歲。她於1439年與SIR RALPH ASHTON在英國藍卡爾米德萊頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1483年在英國藍卡爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.Ashton under Lyne, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当LADY MARGARET DE BARTON于1421年出生在英国藍卡爾米德萊頓时，她的父亲JOHN DE BARTON II26岁，母亲MAUDE MIDDLETON25岁。她于1439年与SIR RALPH ASHTON在英国藍卡爾米德萊頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1483年在英国藍卡爾享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BARTON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called with Old English bere or bær ‘barley’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’, i.e. an outlying grange. Compare Barwick . The name is also found in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as de Bartún.

Polish (Bartoń); Czech and Slovak (mainly Bartoň): from a pet form of the personal name Polish Bartłomiej, Czech Bartoloměj, Slovak Bartolomej, from Latin Bartholomaeus (see Bartholomew ). This surname is also found in Germany.

variants.name: Barwick
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Berwick or Barwick, for example in Northumberland, Norfolk, Somerset, and Yorkshire, from Old English bere ‘barley’ + wīc ‘outlying farm building’, i.e. a granary lying some distance away from the main settlement.
North German: habitational name from a place called Berwick, near Soest, in Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: MARGARET
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When LADY MARGARET DE BARTON was born in 1421, in Middleton, Lancashire, England, her father, JOHN DE BARTON II, was 26 and her mother, MAUDE MIDDLETON, was 25. She married SIR RALPH ASHTON in 1439, in Middleton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1483, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque LADY MARGARET DE BARTON est née en 1421, à Middleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, JOHN DE BARTON II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, MAUDE MIDDLETON, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé SIR RALPH ASHTON en 1439, à Middleton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1483, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als LADY MARGARET DE BARTON 1421 in Middleton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater JOHN DE BARTON II 26 und ihre Mutter MAUDE MIDDLETON 25. Sie hat 1439 in Middleton, Lancashire, England SIR RALPH ASHTON geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1483 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando LADY MARGARET DE BARTON è nata il nel 1421 nel Middleton, Lancashire, England, sua padre, JOHN DE BARTON II, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, MAUDE MIDDLETON, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato SIR RALPH ASHTON nel 1439, nel Middleton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1483, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.Ashton under Lyne, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアアシュトン-ウンデル-リン
ja.Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイア
ja.Middleton, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアミッドレトン
ja.lifeSummary: LADY MARGARET DE BARTONが1421年にイギリスランカシュアイアミッドレトンで生まれた時，父JOHN DE BARTON IIは26歳，母MAUDE MIDDLETONは25歳であった。1439年にイギリスランカシュアイアミッドレトンでSIR RALPH ASHTONと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1483年にイギリスランカシュアイアで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: LADY MARGARET DE BARTON(이)가 1421년 영국 랭카실르 미들레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 JOHN DE BARTON II(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 MAUDE MIDDLETON(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1439년 영국 랭카실르 미들레턴에서 SIR RALPH ASHTON(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1483년 영국 랭카실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando LADY MARGARET DE BARTON nasceu em 1421, em Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, JOHN DE BARTON II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, MAUDE MIDDLETON, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com SIR RALPH ASHTON em 1439, em Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1483, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда LADY MARGARET DE BARTON родилась в 1421 г. в местности миддлетон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени JOHN DE BARTON II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали MAUDE MIDDLETON, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени SIR RALPH ASHTON в 1439 г. в местности миддлетон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1483 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando LADY MARGARET DE BARTON nació en 1421, en Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, JOHN DE BARTON II, tenía 26 años y su mamá, MAUDE MIDDLETON, tenía 25 años. Se casó con SIR RALPH ASHTON en 1439, en Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1483, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
